title: phaseoloides cognatum
intro: Phaseoloides cognatum, also known as the Himalayan bean trefoil, is a plant species in the legume family that is native to the Himalayan region. The plant has been found to possess various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits associated with Phaseoloides cognatum include its ability to lower blood sugar levels, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is often used in traditional medicine in the Himalayan region.
